## Checklist

- [ ] The project has 100+ GitHub stars (or is exceptionally relevant)
- [ ] The project is actively maintained (commits within last 12 months)
- [ ] The project is not already listed
- [ ] I have no commercial affiliation with this project (or disclosed it above)
